name: PWA & Native-App Readiness

playwright.reason: Browser dependencies were not installed in this sandbox; the spec is included for GitHub Actions.

repository_audit.note: The inherited source snapshot does not contain generated data.js or community.js. The v200 changed-files package neither deletes nor replaces live repository copies.

safety_notes: Push deep links are restricted to same-origin Predict2U URLs.
Runtime cache clearing does not delete account or cloud data.
Offline mutations retain their signed-in authorization requirements.
